violations.text: The faucet of the mop sink was observed with large leak/spray when water is turned on. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 10/25/2024
The ceiling throughout the kitchen, prep, and ware-washing areas is covered with tiles that are not smooth, durable, and easily cleanable. New Violation. Correct By: 12/31/2024
